Workflow 7- Folium Map Gallery Tool¶

Aim¶

  1. Creating an Engaging and Interactive 'Ground Truth vs CNN Prediction' Building Inspection Tool
  2. To Assist in Address Validation
  3. When working with Spatial/Address based Data, to assist in & troubleshoot during Training & Classification Workflow Stages
  4. For Visualising Spatial Context and assiting in the Data Narrative

Load Libraries¶

In [3]:
## Load Librarys and Jupyter User Settings
from IPython.core.display import display, HTML
display(HTML("<style>.container { width:760 !important; }</style>"))
#Run Multiple Commands in One Cell
from IPython.core.interactiveshell import InteractiveShell
InteractiveShell.ast_node_interactivity = "all"
#Get All DataFrame Columns
import pandas as pd
pd.set_option('display.max_colwidth', -1) 
import numpy as np
pd.set_option('display.max_columns', None)
import os
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import matplotlib.image as mpimg
from IPython.core.display import display, HTML, Markdown
#display(HTML("<style>.container { width:100% !important; }</style>"))
In [4]:
## Thumb Gallery Helper
def css_styling():
    styles = open('custom_thumbs.css', 'r').read()
    return HTML(styles)
css_styling()    
    
## Table Label Helper
def printmd(string):
    display(Markdown(string))
Out[4]:

Filter the Data by Property Type¶

  • Important, we only use categories that the trainer is familiar with: RD02,3,4,6,CI,CR,CO
In [ ]:
df_label_join =  df_label_join[(df_label_join['ClassificationCode'].str.startswith('RD02'))]
df_label_join = df_ldd_Filter_house_true.append(df_label_join[(df_label_join['ClassificationCode'].str.startswith('RD03'))])
df_label_join = df_ldd_Filter_house_true.append(df_label_join[(df_label_join['ClassificationCode'].str.startswith('RD04'))])
df_label_join = df_ldd_Filter_house_true.append(df_label_join[(df_label_join['ClassificationCode'].str.startswith('RD05'))])
df_label_join = df_ldd_Filter_house_true.append(df_label_join[(df_label_join['ClassificationCode'].str.startswith('RD06'))])
df_label_join = df_ldd_Filter_house_true.append(df_label_join[(df_label_join['ClassificationCode'].str.startswith('CI'))])
df_label_join = df_ldd_Filter_house_true.append(df_label_join[(df_label_join['ClassificationCode'].str.startswith('CR'))])
df_label_join = df_ldd_Filter_house_true.append(df_label_join[(df_label_join['ClassificationCode'].str.startswith('CO'))])

Inspect the Image Thumb Gallery¶

In [ ]:
df_ldd_Filter_house_images =  df_label_join[(df_label_join['Predicted_Label'].str.startswith('house'))]
#imagey = df_ldd_Filter1['TempID'].sample(n=1)

size = 2       # sample size
replace = True  # with replacement
house_thumbsdf = df_ldd_Filter_house_images.groupby('ClassificationCode').filter(lambda x : len(x)>1)
fn = lambda obj: obj.loc[np.random.choice(obj.index, size, replace),:]
house_thumb_gally = house_thumbsdf.groupby('ClassificationCode', as_index=False).apply(fn)
house_thumb_gally_np = house_thumb_gally[['TempID', 'ClassificationCode', 'C_Truth', 'Predicted_Label', 'Label_Score']].values
#house_thumb_gally_np = house_thumb_gally[['TempID_x', 'ClassificationCode',  'Predicted_Label', 'Label_Score']].values


#gallery = "<table><tr>"
gallery = ""

printmd("<br><br><b>`Prediction = House:`</b><br><br>")

for count, element in enumerate(house_thumb_gally_np, 1):
    
    if house_thumb_gally_np[count-1,0] <= 29192:
        inp2 = '../../_STREETVIEW_EXPLORER/LDD_Complete/col_id_' + str(house_thumb_gally_np[count-1,0]) +'.jpg'
    else:
        inp2 = '../../_STREETVIEW_EXPLORER/LDD_Complete/batch2/col_id_' + str(house_thumb_gally_np[count-1,0]) +'.jpg'
    #printmd("<div class='gallery'><td><img src='" +  inp2 + "' width='' height=''/></td></div>")
    inp3 = "<div class='gallery'><div class='zoom'><img src='" +  inp2 + "' width='' height=''></div><div class='desc'>" + "Ground Truth = " + str(house_thumb_gally_np[count-1,2]) + "<br>Label Score = " + str(round(house_thumb_gally_np[count-1,4], 2)) + "</div></div>"
    gallery = gallery + inp3

    #if count % 2 == 0:
    #    mump = mump + "</tr><tr>"
        
#mump = mump + "</tr></table>"    
display(HTML(gallery))

Create the Map Layer Dataframes¶

In [ ]:
# Original Pre London Wide TEst
df_ldd_Filter_house_images =  df_label_join[(df_label_join['Predicted_Label'].str.startswith('house'))]
#imagey = df_ldd_Filter1['TempID'].sample(n=1)

size = 2       # sample size
replace = True  # with replacement
house_thumbsdf = df_ldd_Filter_house_images.groupby('ClassificationCode').filter(lambda x : len(x)>1)
fn = lambda obj: obj.loc[np.random.choice(obj.index, size, replace),:]
house_thumb_gally = house_thumbsdf.groupby('ClassificationCode', as_index=False).apply(fn)
#house_thumb_gally_np = house_thumb_gally[['TempID', 'ClassificationCode', 'C_Truth', 'Predicted_Label', 'Label_Score']].values
house_thumb_gally_np = house_thumb_gally[['TempID_x', 'ClassificationCode',  'Predicted_Label', 'Label_Score']].values


#gallery = "<table><tr>"
gallery = ""

printmd("<br><br><b>`Prediction = House:`</b><br><br>")

for count, element in enumerate(house_thumb_gally_np, 1):
    
    if house_thumb_gally_np[count-1,0] <= 29192:
        inp2 = '../../_STREETVIEW_EXPLORER/LDD_Complete/col_id_' + str(house_thumb_gally_np[count-1,0]) +'.jpg'
    else:
        inp2 = '../../_STREETVIEW_EXPLORER/LDD_Complete/batch2/col_id_' + str(house_thumb_gally_np[count-1,0]) +'.jpg'
    #printmd("<div class='gallery'><td><img src='" +  inp2 + "' width='' height=''/></td></div>")
    inp3 = "<div class='gallery'><div class='zoom'><img src='" +  inp2 + "' width='' height=''></div><div class='desc'>" + "Ground Truth = " + str(house_thumb_gally_np[count-1,2]) + "<br>Label Score = " + str(round(house_thumb_gally_np[count-1,4], 2)) + "</div></div>"
    gallery = gallery + inp3

    #if count % 2 == 0:
    #    mump = mump + "</tr><tr>"
        
#mump = mump + "</tr></table>"    
display(HTML(gallery))

#Add Fuzzy Filters, if missing

#Predicted House Layer
#df_ldd_Filter_house_pred =  df_label_join[(df_label_join['Predicted_Label'].str.startswith('house'))]
df_ldd_Filter_house_pred = df_label_join[df_label_join['Predicted_Label'] == 'house']
#Limit the results for the layer creation, until we are familiar with the outputs(Folium Map, takes a while to generate)
#Limit to 50 now, as Foilum Map Markers can take a while to load up
#df_ldd_Filter_house_pred = df_ldd_Filter_house_pred.head(50)
df_ldd_Filter_house_pred.shape

#Ground Truth House Layer
df_ldd_Filter_house_true =  df_label_join[(df_label_join['ClassificationCode'].str.startswith('RD02'))]
df_ldd_Filter_house_true.shape
df_ldd_Filter_house_true = df_ldd_Filter_house_true.append(df_label_join[(df_label_join['ClassificationCode'].str.startswith('RD03'))])
df_ldd_Filter_house_true.shape
df_ldd_Filter_house_true = df_ldd_Filter_house_true.append(df_label_join[(df_label_join['ClassificationCode'].str.startswith('RD04'))])
# Limit the results for the layer creation, until we are familiar with the outputs(Folium Map, takes a while to generate)

Create the Maps¶

House Property Type Layer¶

In [16]:
#Initialize Array. Create Folium Map Object and set extent
m_h = []
#m = folium.Map(location=[51.53321942, 0.08636771], tiles='OpenStreetMap', zoom_start= 10.5)
m_h = folium.Map(location=[51.53321942, 0.08636771], tiles='stamentoner', zoom_start= 10.5)
In [17]:
#%%capture
#Use Capture Magic to supress noisy Folium Cell Output 
#Ground Truth in Blue
#for i in range(0,len(df_ldd_Filter_house_true)):
#    folium.Circle(radius=60, location=[df_ldd_Filter_house_true.iloc[i]['Latitude_1'], df_ldd_Filter_house_true.iloc[i]['Longitude_1']], popup=folium.Popup( '<a href="https://www.google.com/maps/search/?api=1&query=' + str(df_ldd_Filter_house_pred.iloc[i]['Latitude_1']) + ', ' + str(df_ldd_Filter_house_pred.iloc[i]['Longitude_1']) + '" target="_blank">Truth=House, Predicted=' + str(df_ldd_Filter_house_pred.iloc[i]['Predicted_Label']) +  ' - click to inspect building: ' + str(df_ldd_Filter_house_pred.iloc[i]['TempID']) +  '</a>'), color='blue', fill=True,).add_to(m_h)
In [18]:
### Type is True
In [19]:
%%capture
#Use Capture Magic to supress noisy Folium Cell Output 
#Ground Truth in Blue
for i in range(0,len(df_ldd_Filter_house_true)):
    folium.Circle(radius=60, location=[df_ldd_Filter_house_true.iloc[i]['Latitude'], 
                                       df_ldd_Filter_house_true.iloc[i]['Longitude']], 
                  popup=folium.Popup( '<a href="https://www.google.com/maps/search/?api=1&query=' + 
                                     str(df_ldd_Filter_house_true.iloc[i]['Latitude']) + ', ' + 
                                     str(df_ldd_Filter_house_true.iloc[i]['Longitude']) + 
                                     '" target="_blank">- Truth=House | Predicted=' + 
                                     str(df_ldd_Filter_house_true.iloc[i]['Predicted_Label']) +  
                                     '. <br>' + 
                                     '- Click Here to Inspect Location.<br>- Building ID: ' + 
                                     str(df_ldd_Filter_house_true.iloc[i]['TempID']) +  '</a>'), 
                  color='blue', fill=True,).add_to(m_h)
In [20]:
%%capture
#Predicted in Red
for i in range(0,len(df_ldd_Filter_house_pred)):
    folium.Circle(radius=5, location=[df_ldd_Filter_house_pred.iloc[i]['Latitude'], 
                                      df_ldd_Filter_house_pred.iloc[i]['Longitude']], 
                  popup=folium.Popup( '<a href="https://www.google.com/maps/search/?api=1&query=' + 
                                     str(df_ldd_Filter_house_pred.iloc[i]['Latitude']) + ', ' + 
                                     str(df_ldd_Filter_house_pred.iloc[i]['Longitude']) + 
                                     '" target="_blank">- Predicted=House | Truth=' + 
                                     str(df_ldd_Filter_house_pred.iloc[i]['C_Truth']) +  
                                     '. <br>' + 
                                     '- Click Here to Inspect Location.<br>- Building ID: ' + 
                                     str(df_ldd_Filter_house_pred.iloc[i]['TempID']) +  '</a>'), color='red', 
                  fill=True,).add_to(m_h)

If the Red Prediction Marker forms a Bullseye inside the Blue Truth Marker then we have a successfull classification. Otherwise we can discern and inspect the discrepancy via Google Map tools parsed on the building in question.

In [21]:
m_h
m_h.save('m_h.html')
Out[21]:
Hover and Click to Inspect Building Location Details with Google Maps API:¶

Flats Property Type Layer¶

In [22]:
#Initialize Array. Create Folium Map Object and set extent
m_f = []
#m = folium.Map(location=[51.53321942, 0.08636771], tiles='OpenStreetMap', zoom_start= 10.5)
m_f = folium.Map(location=[51.53321942, 0.08636771], tiles='stamentoner', zoom_start= 10.5)
%%capture #Ground Truth in Blue for i in range(0,len(df_ldd_Filter_flat_true)): folium.Circle(radius=60, location=[df_ldd_Filter_flat_true.iloc[i]['Latitude_1'], df_ldd_Filter_flat_true.iloc[i]['Longitude_1']], popup='Ground Truth: House', color='blue', fill=True,).add_to(m_f)
In [23]:
%%capture
#Use Capture Magic to supress noisy Folium Cell Output 
#Ground Truth in Blue
for i in range(0,len(df_ldd_Filter_flat_true)):
    folium.Circle(radius=60, location=[df_ldd_Filter_flat_true.iloc[i]['Latitude'], 
                                       df_ldd_Filter_flat_true.iloc[i]['Longitude']], 
                  popup=folium.Popup( '<a href="https://www.google.com/maps/search/?api=1&query=' +

                                     str(df_ldd_Filter_flat_true.iloc[i]['Longitude']) + 
                                     '" target="_blank">- Truth=Flats | Predicted=' + 
                                     str(df_ldd_Filter_flat_true.iloc[i]['Predicted_Label']) +  
                                     '. <br>' + 
                                     '- Click Here to Inspect Location.<br>- Building ID: ' + 
                                     str(df_ldd_Filter_flat_true.iloc[i]['TempID']) +  '</a>'), 
                  color='blue', fill=True,).add_to(m_f)
%%capture #Predicted in Red for i in range(0,len(df_ldd_Filter_flat_pred)): folium.Circle(radius=30, location=[df_ldd_Filter_flat_pred.iloc[i]['Latitude_1'], df_ldd_Filter_flat_pred.iloc[i]['Longitude_1']], popup='Prediction: House', color='red', fill=True,).add_to(m_f)

Office Property Type Layer¶

In [30]:
#Initialize Array. Create Folium Map Object and set extent
m_o = []
#m = folium.Map(location=[51.53321942, 0.08636771], tiles='OpenStreetMap', zoom_start= 10.5)
m_o = folium.Map(location=[51.53321942, 0.08636771], tiles='stamentoner', zoom_start= 10.5)
In [31]:
%%capture
#Use Capture Magic to supress noisy Folium Cell Output 
#Ground Truth in Blue
for i in range(0,len(df_ldd_Filter_office_true)):
    folium.Circle(radius=60, location=[df_ldd_Filter_office_true.iloc[i]['Latitude'], 
                                       df_ldd_Filter_office_true.iloc[i]['Longitude']], 
                  popup=folium.Popup( '<a href="https://www.google.com/maps/search/?api=1&query=' + 
                                     str(df_ldd_Filter_office_true.iloc[i]['Latitude']) + ', ' + 
                                     str(df_ldd_Filter_office_true.iloc[i]['Longitude']) + 
                                     '" target="_blank">- Truth=Office | Predicted=' + 
                                     str(df_ldd_Filter_office_true.iloc[i]['Predicted_Label']) +  
                                     '. <br>' + 
                                     '- Click Here to Inspect Location.<br>- Building ID: ' + 
                                     str(df_ldd_Filter_office_true.iloc[i]['TempID']) +  '</a>'), 
                  color='blue', fill=True,).add_to(m_o)

In [41]:
#Create Map for all
m_all = []
#m = folium.Map(location=[51.53321942, 0.08636771], tiles='OpenStreetMap', zoom_start= 10.5)
m_all = folium.Map(location=[51.53321942, 0.08636771], tiles='stamentoner', zoom_start= 10.5)
In [42]:
%%capture
# add flats to the map_all layer
#Ground Truth in Blue
for i in range(0,len(df_ldd_Filter_office_true)):
    folium.Circle(radius=60, location=[df_ldd_Filter_office_true.iloc[i]['Latitude'], 
                                       df_ldd_Filter_office_true.iloc[i]['Longitude']], 
                  popup='', color='blue', fill=True,).add_to(m_all)

for i in range(0,len(df_ldd_Filter_office_pred)):
    folium.Circle(radius=10, location=[df_ldd_Filter_office_pred.iloc[i]['Latitude'], 
                                       df_ldd_Filter_office_pred.iloc[i]['Longitude']], 
                  popup='', color='red', fill=True,).add_to(m_all)
